---
title: "R Script Documentation"
author: "Imad Ramadan"
date: "2026"
output: html_document
---

# Overview
This document describes a simple R script used for basic data analysis.

# Objective
The purpose of this script is to create a dataset and generate summary statistics.

# Code Example

```r
# Load library
library(tidyverse)

# Create sample data
data <- data.frame(
  category = c("A", "B", "C"),
  value = c(10, 20, 15)
)

# Display summary
summary(data)

Explanation

The script creates a simple dataset with categories and values, then summarizes it using the summary() function.

Conclusion

This demonstrates a basic R workflow including data creation and analysis.
